programs.title: Love Island: Beyond the Villa
programs.desc: The Islanders take a trip to Lake Tahoe; Bryan's attempt to greet Amaya causes a heated fallout; Iris confronts Belle-A about their issues; Chris' actions leave Coco uneasy about their relationship; the girls are divided.

programs.desc: Gracyn, Belle-A and Coco confront Iris and Hannah about feeling iced out; Amaya lets Bryan know her boundaries; Chris and Coco decide what's next for them; Andreina calls out Jeremiah's mixed signals.

programs.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programs.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programs.title: Sleeping Dogs
programs.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he can't recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programs.title: The Penguin Lessons
programs.desc: An Englishman experiences personal and political changes after adopting a penguin during a turbulent time in Argentina's history.
